title: Lucky rocks
description: Rock that can give you a random effect.
body:
What is it about?

This mod adds various stones that will give you effects when you have them in your inventory. If you right-click with the Lucky Rock, you can randomly obtain one of the other stones.

How can i get it?

To obtain the Lucky Rock, you will have to kill hostile mobs. There is an 8% chance of it dropping.

Required mods

Architectury api and RestApi
